import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(file_path="data.csv", columns=["A", "B", "C"]):
    # Read CSV file into a DataFrame
    df = pd.read_csv(file_path)

    # Convert numeric values in the specified columns to floats
    for column in columns:
        df[column] = pd.to_numeric(df[column], errors='coerce')

    # Drop any NaN or null values
    df.dropna(inplace=True)

    # Compute the cube-root of the data and create a new Series
    cube_root = df[columns].apply(np.cbrt, axis=0)

    # Draw a line chart of the specified columns
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    for column in columns:
        ax.plot(df.index, df[column], label=column)
    ax.legend()
    ax.set_xlabel('Index')
    ax.set_ylabel('Value')
    ax.set_title('Line Chart of the Specified Columns')

    return df, ax, cube_root
